description: Evidence-backed base JavaScript surface allowed in translated MK/NewOA form scripts for the current XML route-validation scope.
evidencePolicy: Methods are admitted only when they are standard ECMAScript/browser timer/encoding primitives already exercised by route-validation fixtures or needed by translated MK script examples. DOM APIs and browser storage remain outside this catalog and are blocked by script validation.

globals.name: parseInt
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript global; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Use for numeric parsing only; prefer explicit radix in generated code.

globals.name: parseFloat
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript global; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.

globals.name: isNaN
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript global; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for compatibility with legacy numeric checks.

globals.name: isFinite
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript global; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for compatibility with legacy numeric checks.

globals.name: Number
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript constructor/function; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed as a conversion function or constructor call.

globals.name: String
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript constructor/function; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed as a conversion function or constructor call.

globals.name: Boolean
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript constructor/function; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed as a conversion function or constructor call.

globals.name: Date
globals.evidence: Standard ECMAScript constructor/function; existing route-validation script validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for basic date creation/parsing in route-validation scripts.

globals.name: Promise
globals.evidence: Existing onBeforeSubmit validation accepts Promise-returning handlers; existing validator allowed Promise before this catalog.

globals.name: resolve
globals.evidence: Existing route-validation script validator allowed local Promise callback parameters named resolve/reject before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for Promise executor callbacks; local helper names still take precedence.

globals.name: reject
globals.evidence: Existing route-validation script validator allowed local Promise callback parameters named resolve/reject before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for Promise executor callbacks; local helper names still take precedence.

globals.name: setTimeout
globals.evidence: Legacy route-validation fixtures and function-whitelist tests contain timer-wrapped script snippets; existing validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Use sparingly; generated executable scripts should prefer deterministic MK events.

globals.name: clearTimeout
globals.evidence: Browser timer primitive paired with setTimeout; existing validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed only as base runtime utility.

globals.name: encodeURIComponent
globals.evidence: Standard browser/ECMAScript URI helper; existing validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for query parameter encoding before MKXFORM.ajax.

globals.name: decodeURIComponent
globals.evidence: Standard browser/ECMAScript URI helper; existing validator allowed it before this catalog.
globals.notes: Allowed for decoding route-validation string values.

staticMethods.name: Array.isArray
staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Array static method; replaces the previous broad Array.* allowance.
staticMethods.notes: Use for defensive checks on MKXFORM values.

staticMethods.name: Array.from
staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Array static method; replaces the previous broad Array.* allowance.
staticMethods.notes: Use for converting array-like values only when generated code needs it.

staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Object static method; replaces the previous broad Object.* allowance.

staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Object static method; replaces the previous broad Object.* allowance.

staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Object static method; replaces the previous broad Object.* allowance.

staticMethods.name: Object.assign
staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript Object static method; replaces the previous broad Object.* allowance.

staticMethods.name: JSON.parse
staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript JSON method; existing validator previously allowed JSON.*.
staticMethods.notes: Use only for controlled JSON strings from known route-validation sources.

staticMethods.name: JSON.stringify
staticMethods.evidence: Standard ECMAScript JSON method; existing validator previously allowed JSON.*.
staticMethods.notes: Allowed for preparing simple payloads or diagnostic strings.

staticMethods.name: console.log
staticMethods.evidence: Existing function catalog examples include console.log inside MKXFORM.callOrg callback; previous validator allowed console.*.
staticMethods.notes: Debug only; generated executable scripts should not depend on console output.

staticMethods.name: console.warn
staticMethods.evidence: Browser console method paired with console.log for diagnostic compatibility; previous validator allowed console.*.

staticMethods.name: console.error
staticMethods.evidence: Browser console method paired with console.log for diagnostic compatibility; previous validator allowed console.*.

unsupported.name: eval
unsupported.reason: Dynamic code execution is outside the route-validation trust boundary.

unsupported.name: Function
unsupported.reason: Dynamic code construction is outside the route-validation trust boundary.

unsupported.name: localStorage.getItem
unsupported.reason: Browser storage is not part of MK form data migration semantics.

unsupported.name: sessionStorage.getItem
unsupported.reason: Browser storage is not part of MK form data migration semantics.

unsupported.name: fetch
unsupported.reason: Network access from migrated form scripts is not allowed without explicit target API design.

unsupported.name: XMLHttpRequest
unsupported.reason: Network access from migrated form scripts is not allowed without explicit target API design.
